sub_pixel_system.notes: FPS on Carmack's engine; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Grid-based Level Design
special_mechanics.description: Levels are flat planes divided into grid-based areas with walls and doors of equal height. Player traverses through areas to reach elevators.

tier_notes: Tier 2: FPS game with movement mechanics not numerically documented in available sources. Wikipedia article focuses on gameplay overview, plot, and development history rather than physics parameters. Spear of Destiny is a standalone retail episode sequel to Wolfenstein 3D, developed by id Software using Carmack's engine architecture.
